correctness.justification: The analytics dashboard accurately displays page views and unique visitors, and the time range filter correctly updates the data.

completeness.justification: All expected features (dashboard loading, metrics displayed, time range filter) are present and functional. Additional metrics could enhance completeness, but core requirements are met.

efficiency.justification: The dashboard loads quickly, and data retrieval for different time ranges is performant without noticeable delays.

robustness.justification: The system handles cases with no traffic gracefully, displaying appropriate messages. Error handling for data retrieval issues is also well-managed.

user_experience.justification: The analytics dashboard is intuitive, visually appealing, and easy to navigate. The time range filter is clearly presented and simple to use.

maintainability.justification: The underlying code for the analytics dashboard appears to be well-structured and modular, suggesting good maintainability.

innovation.justification: While the core analytics features are standard, the implementation offers a clean and responsive design. No groundbreaking innovative features are present beyond baseline expectations.

scores.assessment: The implementation of project analytics is robust and user-friendly, providing accurate and timely traffic metrics. It fully meets the expected behavior with a polished user experience.
